phase8_native_route_arbitration.support_scope: runtime route arbitration support only; not semantic choice, agency, RC identity collapse, identity acceptance, locomotion-like behavior, biological behavior, or unrestricted movement

phase8_next.goal: implement native causal pulse-substrate surface lineage transport using LGRC-3 topology/lineage semantics
phase8_next.not_goal: do not prove movement, adaptive topology, choice, agency, or locomotion inside Phase 8

return_to_n04_after_phase8.probe_goal: Iteration 23 freezes the topology-mutating movement candidate after stress, native route arbitration, and identity-boundary reruns
